title: miliusa lanceolata
intro: Miliusa lanceolata, also known as the Lanceolate Miliusa or Indian plum, is a plant species found in the tropical forests of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can aid in wound healing and infection prevention. The health benefits of Miliusa lanceolata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and it can also be made into a paste or ointment for topical application.
